case_title: ST. FRANCIS PLACE LIMITED PARTNERSHIP, A vs. AKINS, SOLOMON, IND. & DBA SIMPLY ELEGANT et al

docket_entries.description: JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.

JUDGE DONALDSON, SWONG-REPORTER, JWILLIS-MCGHEE, CLERK 9:45AM C/C FOR COURT TRIAL; ALL PARTIES PRESENT & REPRESENT BY COUNSEL; CASE SETTLED; STIP FOR JUDGMENT AS FOLL RESTITUTION OF PREMISES LOCATED AT 685 FOLSOM ST; LEASE FORF; RENT OF $2705.94; DAM P/DAY $90.20 FROM 11/1/98 THRU PRESENT; $900. ATTY FEES; $254 COSTS; JUDGMT WILL BE ENTERED IF DEFT PAYS THE FOLLOWING ON/BEF 12/3/98 $2500. BY 4PM; ON/BEF 12/7/98 $1000. BY 4PM; ON/BEF 12/14/98 $3500. BY 4PM; ON/BEF 12/21/ 98 $3239.50 BY 4PM; ALL PAYMT IN THE FORM OF A CASHIER'S CHK; DEFT MUST PAY RENT BY THE 9TH OF EACH MONTH; DEFT TO VACATED PREMISES ON/BEF 5/31/99; SEC DEP WILL BE DEALT WITH BY LAW; IF DEFT VACATES DISM WILL BE FILED; TERMS OF STIP WILL BVE DELIVERED BY FAX; SIGNATURE TO BE RETURNED BY 12 NOON 12/3/98; FAILURE TO COMPLY, PLTF ENTITLED TO ENTER JUDGMT IMMED AND EXECUTION OF WRIT TO ISSUE IMMED; PLTF TO PREPARE STIP

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AKINS, SOLOMON, IND. & DBA SIMPLY ELEGANT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 685 FOLSOM ST, SF, CA $2,705.94 RENT, $900.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $166.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,772.44, LEASE FORFEITED, JUDGMT MAY ENTER & WRIT MAY ISSUE BUT ACTUAL EVICTION SHALL NOT TAKE PLACE ON THE COND THAT DEFT PERFORM TERMS & COND OF STIP
